Hard water (formal, hierarchical communication norms) with high mineral content produces dry, structured sake (crisp, unambiguous communications) through vigorous fermentation; soft water (informal, flat communication norms) produces gentler, sweeter sake (collaborative, exploratory messages) through slower fermentation. Organizations that obsess over rice selection (message content) while ignoring their water profile (communication culture) misattribute their communication failures to content problems when they are medium problems.

name: Hydraulic Jump Theory of Grief Processing
core_claim: Grief processing involves a hydraulic jump: the bereaved person's emotional state transitions from supercritical flow (high-velocity, shallow — the initial shock phase where emotions move too fast for reflection) to subcritical flow (slow, deep — the integrated grief state where emotions move slowly but with great depth). The hydraulic jump itself — the turbulent transition zone — is the acute grief crisis, and its violence is proportional to the Froude number (the ratio between the speed of emotional processing and the depth of the loss). Therapeutic intervention should not try to prevent the jump (it is hydraulically inevitable) but should manage its location and energy dissipation, the way engineers place stilling basins downstream of spillways.

name: Morse Huffman Analogy Theory of Therapeutic Language Selection
core_claim: Effective therapy requires Morse-Huffman optimal encoding: Morse code assigns the shortest symbols to the most frequent letters (E = dot, T = dash) following the same principle as Huffman coding. Therapists should similarly assign their shortest, simplest interventions to the most frequent client patterns, reserving complex interpretive frameworks for rare, genuinely unusual presentations. The pathology of psychotherapeutic training is that it encodes common problems with long codes (elaborate theoretical formulations for ordinary sadness, anxiety, interpersonal friction) while leaving rare conditions with short codes ('it's complex PTSD' — a label that compresses away the very detail that would enable treatment). A Huffman-optimal therapeutic language would ensure that encoding length is inversely proportional to pattern frequency, maximizing therapeutic bandwidth per session-minute.

name: Coriolis Deflection Theory of Career Trajectories
core_claim: Career trajectories in large organizations are deflected by a Coriolis-like force: individuals moving 'poleward' (toward senior leadership) experience a systematic rightward deflection into staff roles, advisory positions, and lateral moves, because the organization's rotational velocity (pace of change) increases with hierarchical altitude. Those who attempt rapid ascent without accounting for this deflection end up in positions they did not intend, while those who understand the deflection can use it to navigate to desired positions by aiming off-target.

name: Rhizosphere Carbon Pump Theory of Knowledge Management
core_claim: Organizational knowledge flows follow rhizosphere carbon pump dynamics: expert employees (root systems) exude tacit knowledge (carbon exudates) into the surrounding organizational soil, feeding a microbiome of junior staff and contractors who mineralize this tacit knowledge into explicit, usable forms. The 'priming effect' — where fresh knowledge inputs accelerate the decomposition of old institutional knowledge — explains why new hires paradoxically cause organizations to lose legacy knowledge: their fresh exudates stimulate breakdown of stored organizational memory.

name: Myofibroblast Tension Feedback Theory of Post-Conflict Reconstruction
core_claim: Post-conflict societies heal through myofibroblast tension feedback: initial wound closure (ceasefire, peace agreement) is followed by a contraction phase where the social 'wound edges' are pulled together by tension-generating institutions (truth commissions, reconstruction agencies) that function as societal myofibroblasts. Excessive contraction produces scarring (authoritarian overcorrection, ethnic homogenization), while insufficient contraction leaves a chronic open wound (frozen conflict). The mechanical feedback signal that tells biological myofibroblasts when to stop contracting (matrix stiffness reaching threshold) maps onto the institutional signals that should trigger transition from reconstruction to normalization.

name: Dendro Dead-Wood Extension Theory of Historical Narrative Reconstruction
core_claim: Historical narrative reconstruction uses dead-wood extension logic: living records (contemporary accounts) provide a firmly dated chronology, but the deeper past must be reconstructed by cross-matching overlapping dead records (fragmentary sources) whose absolute dates are unknown. The technique works only when records share a common signal (climate for tree rings, political events for historical texts) and overlap sufficiently to establish unique cross-dating. Pseudo-histories fail the same way false cross-dates fail — they produce plausible local patterns that collapse when checked against independent reference chronologies.

name: Parkour Obstacle Grammar Theory of Regulatory Compliance Strategy
core_claim: Regulatory environments constitute an obstacle grammar that firms must parse: each regulation is a grammatical element (wall, rail, gap) with defined physical properties, and compliance strategies are sentences composed by chaining obstacle-specific moves (vaults, precisions, wall runs) in grammatically valid sequences. Expert compliance officers, like expert traceurs, develop fluency in the grammar — they read a regulatory landscape and immediately see the optimal movement sequence, while novices see only individual obstacles. Regulatory reform that changes the grammar (restructuring rules) is more disruptive than reform that merely resizes existing obstacles.

name: Sake Koji Enzyme Balance Theory of Classroom Instruction Design
core_claim: Classroom instruction design requires koji enzyme balance: the teacher must cultivate multiple enzyme activities (teaching methods) simultaneously — amylase (breaking complex concepts into digestible units), protease (breaking down students' existing misconceptions), and lipase (dissolving motivational barriers). Over-emphasis on any single enzyme produces imbalanced flavor: pure amylase instruction (constant simplification) produces sweet but shallow understanding; pure protease (Socratic deconstruction) produces umami depth but leaves students without constructive frameworks. The koji mold's ability to produce all three enzymes simultaneously from a single organism is the pedagogical ideal.

name: Sourdough Starter Succession Theory of Political Party Formation
core_claim: Political party formation follows sourdough starter succession dynamics: an initial inoculation of diverse political microorganisms (factions, ideologies, interest groups) undergoes competitive succession where early colonizers (charismatic founders) create environmental conditions (party platforms, norms) that eventually favor their own successors and displace themselves. The mature starter reaches a stable symbiosis between 'yeast' factions (those generating electoral rise) and 'lactobacillus' factions (those producing the acidic environment that excludes competitors), and this stable culture can be maintained indefinitely through regular 'feeding' (elections) but collapses if starved.

name: Glassblowing Bubble Inflation Theory of Speculative Narrative Creation
core_claim: Speculative fiction creation follows glass bubble inflation dynamics: the writer begins with a small gather of molten glass (core premise), and inflation (narrative development) must be precisely calibrated — too much pressure too early and the bubble wall thins unevenly and bursts (worldbuilding collapses under its own inconsistencies); too little pressure and the glass cools before achieving its shape (the narrative stalls before reaching critical mass). The glassblower's technique of continuous rotation (maintaining narrative momentum through subplots and character development) prevents gravitational sagging (the tendency of speculative premises to collapse under real-world plausibility). The finished vessel's thickness must be uniform — speculative narratives with 'thin spots' (under-developed implications of their premise) are structurally weak even if the overall form is beautiful.

name: Photonic Bandgap Theory of Social Stratification
core_claim: Social class boundaries function as photonic bandgaps: certain 'wavelengths' of social mobility (specific types of advancement — educational, entrepreneurial, cultural) are forbidden within the bandgap, while others propagate freely. The periodicity of social structure (repeating patterns of institutional gatekeeping) creates these forbidden bands through destructive interference of mobility attempts. Class disruption technologies (universal education, internet access) work by introducing defect states that create allowed modes within the bandgap, enabling tunneling across class boundaries.

name: Aristotelian Ethos-Pathos-Logos Theory of Drug Design
core_claim: Effective drug design requires the pharmaceutical equivalent of Aristotle's three modes of persuasion: ethos (the drug's credibility — pharmacokinetic profile that reaches the target tissue), pathos (emotional resonance — binding affinity that triggers the receptor's conformational response), and logos (rational argument — selectivity that logically discriminates between target and off-target receptors). Drugs that succeed in trials but fail in practice typically have strong logos (selective) and pathos (potent) but weak ethos (poor bioavailability) — they make a compelling molecular argument that never reaches the audience.

name: Morse Huffman Analogy Theory of Liturgical Compression
core_claim: Liturgical traditions evolve toward Huffman-optimal encoding: the most frequently performed rituals (high-frequency symbols) are compressed into the shortest ceremonial forms (dots), while rare ceremonies (low-frequency symbols) retain elaborate, extended formats (dashes). The Morse-Huffman analogy reveals that liturgical reform is fundamentally an encoding optimization problem — the post-Vatican II simplification of Catholic Mass was a re-encoding that assigned shorter codes to the most common liturgical 'messages,' increasing throughput (more masses per day) at the cost of reduced redundancy (loss of error-correcting ritual repetition that helped congregants track their place in the ceremony).

name: Taxidermy Eye Setting Theory of Data Visualization Design
core_claim: Data visualization design faces the taxidermist's eye-setting problem: the eyes (key data points, headline metrics) are always artificial and are always the element that determines whether the viewer perceives the specimen (visualization) as alive or dead. Glass eyes that are anatomically correct but improperly set (accurate data, poor visual hierarchy) produce an unsettling, cross-eyed mount that repels rather than informs. The taxidermist's rule — set the eyes first and build the rest of the mount around them — maps onto the visualization principle that the most important data point should determine the entire composition, not be inserted last into a pre-built template.

name: Semaphore Error Cascade Theory of Misinformation Spread
core_claim: Misinformation propagation follows semaphore error cascade dynamics: in a relay chain, each station's small misreading of the previous station's arm positions compounds multiplicatively, and the message degrades fastest when the alphabet is large (nuanced claims) and visibility is poor (low media literacy). The semaphore insight is that error correction requires redundancy at the encoding level (simpler, more distinctive signal shapes), not at the relay level (more fact-checkers in the chain). Reducing the 'alphabet' of public discourse — using fewer, more visually distinct claim-shapes — would reduce cascade errors more effectively than adding relay stations.

name: Memetic Clonal Selection: Ideational Affinity Maturation
core_claim: Immune repertoire diversification follows memetic dynamics where lymphocyte clones function as idea-units competing for antigenic attention, with somatic hypermutation acting as transmission-error variation and clonal expansion as viral resharing within the body's internal communication network.

mapped_components.unit: Each lymphocyte clone is a 'somameme' — a self-replicating informational unit whose receptor sequence encodes a transmissible recognition pattern
mapped_components.variation: Somatic hypermutation in germinal centers maps to memetic mutation during transmission; each B-cell division introduces copying errors in the variable region
mapped_components.selection: Antigen binding affinity maps to attentional selection; follicular dendritic cells presenting antigen act as the 'audience' whose engagement determines which clone-memes get amplified
mapped_components.fitness: Clone proliferation rate is the immunological copy-count; high-affinity clones achieve viral spread while low-affinity variants fail to propagate
mapped_components.boundary: Self/non-self discrimination maps to host-mind and channel boundaries; central tolerance functions as content moderation that purges memes incompatible with the network's identity

falsifiable_predictions: Germinal center output diversity should exhibit the same heavy-tailed (power-law) distribution seen in meme popularity on social networks, testable via single-cell BCR sequencing of post-vaccination germinal centers.

Introducing artificial communication bottlenecks (e.g., partially blocking T-follicular-helper cell signaling) should shift clonal selection from affinity-driven to stochastic, measurable as decreased average affinity maturation rate with increased clonal diversity variance.

name: Karmic Bubble Theory
core_claim: Speculative bubbles accumulate 'market karma' through aggregate trade intentionality — momentum trades generate unwholesome karma that deterministically degrades future price quality, and bubble collapse is the financial equivalent of karmic rebirth into a lower realm.

mapped_components.unit: Intentional trade — each transaction carries karmic charge defined by intention (speculative momentum vs fundamentals-based conviction)
mapped_components.variation: Wholesome trades (fundamentals-driven, information-producing) vs unwholesome trades (momentum-chasing, noise-amplifying); ratio constitutes market's karmic balance sheet
mapped_components.selection: Moral causation as deterministic feedback: accumulated unwholesome intention compounds invisibly in microstructure (widening spreads, correlation clustering, declining liquidity)
mapped_components.fitness: Rebirth quality of market regime: wholesome karma → stable efficient pricing; unwholesome → crash/stagnation proportional to accumulated karmic stock
mapped_components.boundary: The recurring boom-bust cycle maps to saṃsāra; perfect informational efficiency = nibbāna (unreachable absorbing state)

falsifiable_predictions: Markets with higher short-horizon momentum volume (unwholesome karma proxy) will experience greater post-peak drawdowns and longer recovery than markets with equivalent price-deviation but lower momentum share, controlling for leverage.

The speculative-to-fundamental volume ratio in the 12 months preceding a peak will predict post-crash recovery duration with higher R² than price-to-earnings deviation alone, testable across historical equity and crypto bubbles.

name: The Incompleteness of the Sacred
core_claim: Any theological system rich enough to articulate claims about the divine necessarily contains true statements about the divine that cannot be derived from its own axioms, structurally guaranteeing that apophatic residue is not a mystical preference but a formal inevitability.

mapped_components.unit: Theological proposition (any affirmative or negative claim about the divine)
mapped_components.variation: Candidate doctrinal predicates — omnipotence, goodness, simplicity, trinitarian relations, etc.
mapped_components.selection: Self-referential audit: when a theology applies its own adequacy criteria to itself, it surfaces claims it can neither affirm nor deny without contradiction
mapped_components.fitness: Ratio of coherent expressible truths to necessarily unsayable truths; maximal consistency forces maximal incompleteness
mapped_components.boundary: Any theological language expressive enough to predicate attributes of the divine AND quantify over its own predications

falsifiable_predictions: The number of formally undecidable core doctrines will scale positively with the expressive richness of a tradition's doctrinal language — richer vocabularies exhibit strictly more apophatic retreats, measurable by comparative content analysis.

A theological system achieving full internal consistency on all affirmative predicates (no paradoxes) will be demonstrably less expressive — covering a strict subset of propositions addressable by a paradox-tolerant sibling formalization.

name: Autopoietic Attention
core_claim: Transformer attention heads redesigned as self-producing systems where Q/K/V projections are regenerated by their own outputs achieve organizational closure — self-maintaining and adaptive without external parameter updates at inference time.

name: Agentic Gradient Compliance
core_claim: SGD works via an obedience mechanism: parameters cede local optimization to a centralized gradient authority. Compliance increases with graduated commitment (warm-up) and authority legitimacy (batch size), mirroring Milgram's obedience dynamics.

mapped_components.unit: Individual parameter surrendering local curvature info to aggregate gradient authority
mapped_components.variation: Batch size as authority legitimacy — small batches = dubious authority, large = lab-coated Yale experimenter
mapped_components.selection: Agentic state — parameters move per global gradient even when locally suboptimal
mapped_components.fitness: Loss reduction through collective obedience, not individual optimization
mapped_components.boundary: Learning rate as graduated commitment threshold; too high = destructive compliance, too low = resistance

falsifiable_predictions: Learning rate warm-up is more critical for small-batch (low-legitimacy) than large-batch training.
Per-parameter veto rights (reject updates increasing local loss) improve generalization at cost of convergence speed.
Conflicting loss functions reduce effective update magnitude proportional to gradient disagreement, not noise level.

name: Defensive Zero-Knowledge
core_claim: Zero-knowledge proofs select from a menu of proof strategies analogous to ego defense mechanisms — commitment schemes as repression, simulator proofs as projection, homomorphic commitments as sublimation — each trading computational cost against information leakage.

mapped_components.unit: Prover's private witness facing the anxiety-producing verification demand
mapped_components.variation: Menu of proof strategies: repression (commitment), projection (simulator), sublimation (homomorphic), denial (witness-indistinguishable)
mapped_components.selection: Choose the strategy minimizing information leakage at lowest computational cost
mapped_components.fitness: Short-term: proof accepted, zero knowledge. Long-term: sound under composition
mapped_components.boundary: Computational assumptions as unconscious operation boundary — broken assumptions collapse all defenses

falsifiable_predictions: Under high adversarial pressure, adaptive ZK systems converge toward most expensive but information-minimal strategy.
Layered proof strategies show diminishing privacy gains per layer but increasing fragility.
Sublimation strategies (SNARKs) outperform repression strategies (Sigma protocols) in concrete efficiency.

name: Self-Determined Fermentation
core_claim: Microbial colonies meeting analogues of autonomy (substrate choice), competence (enzymatic feedback), and relatedness (quorum sensing) shift from opportunistic to robust intrinsic fermentation — controlling conditions suppress this transition like controlling social contexts undermine intrinsic motivation.

mapped_components.unit: Microbial colony as motivated agent on amotivation-to-intrinsic continuum
mapped_components.variation: Metabolic modes from dormant through sugar-exploiting to cooperative lactobacillus metabolism
mapped_components.selection: Three microbial needs: substrate accessibility, enzymatic feedback, quorum-sensing integration
mapped_components.fitness: Stable pH, complex flavor profiles, long-term colony viability
mapped_components.boundary: Excessive salt/temperature/forced anaerobiosis = controlling context suppressing intrinsic fermentation

falsifiable_predictions: Graduated substrate diversity produces more complex flavors and stable lactobacillus-dominant communities.
Quorum sensing before anaerobiosis yields faster target pH than immediate strict conditions.
Abrupt extreme salt shows less metabolite diversity than gradually introduced salt at same final concentration.

name: Sequential Crisis Nucleation Theory
core_claim: Dissipative structures undergo an ordered sequence of critical transitions where each resolution constrains subsequent bifurcation outcomes — systems that skip or fail early stages cannot access high-order structures later, mirroring how Erikson's unresolved stages limit later psychosocial development.

mapped_components.unit: Dissipative structure at a specific bifurcation point in its developmental trajectory
mapped_components.variation: Binary resolution at each bifurcation: nucleate higher-order structure (virtue) or collapse to trapped state (maladaptation)
mapped_components.selection: Adaptive resolution at stage n expands phase space at n+1; maladaptive lock-in restricts it
mapped_components.fitness: Cumulative entropy production efficiency across the full bifurcation sequence
mapped_components.boundary: Bifurcation sequence invariant for a given system class; boundary conditions shape crisis form, not order

falsifiable_predictions: Systems failing to establish stable convection at low Rayleigh numbers show reduced repertoire of states at high numbers.
Incrementally ramped forcing produces higher time-averaged entropy production than direct jumps to high throughput.
Benard cells with stabilized intermediate patterns develop more coherent turbulence at high Rayleigh numbers.

name: Effort-Qualified Turbulence (EQT)
core_claim: Turbulent flow structures classified by four Laban-like effort factors: Weight (momentum flux), Time (acceleration profile), Space (vorticity alignment), Flow (strain constraint). The combinatorial state determines each parcel's role in the turbulent cascade.

mapped_components.unit: Coherent fluid parcel (eddy/vortex tube) characterized by effort combination
mapped_components.variation: Four factors: Weight=momentum flux, Time=acceleration, Space=vorticity-strain alignment, Flow=constraint
mapped_components.selection: Reynolds number governs which combinations dominate; low Re = sustained-light-direct-bound (laminar)
mapped_components.fitness: Effort combination predicts contribution to dissipation and mixing efficiency
mapped_components.boundary: Viscosity/density set achievable range; boundary geometry constrains near-wall combinations

falsifiable_predictions: Sudden-strong-indirect-free parcels account for >60% of dissipation despite <25% of volume.
Sustained-light-direct-bound fraction crosses 50% near critical Re — new transition diagnostic.
Effort class distribution shows universal wall-normal stratification in wall units.

name: Staged Consensus Maturation
core_claim: Blockchain nodes undergo invariant developmental stages (reactive sync → symbolic validation → rule-based verification → formal reasoning) driven by disequilibrium, and no stage can be skipped without compromising fault tolerance — mirroring Piaget's cognitive development.

mapped_components.unit: Node's consensus schema — internal model of valid chain state
mapped_components.variation: Four stages: sensorimotor (sync-respond), preoperational (symbolic but no reversibility), concrete (rule-based verification), formal (hypothetical reasoning about partitions)
mapped_components.selection: Disequilibrium from forks/Byzantine messages forces schema accommodation or fork-off
mapped_components.fitness: Finality depth, reorg resilience, BFT threshold — increase with stage
mapped_components.boundary: Minimum observation history and computational capacity; stages build on prior structures

falsifiable_predictions: Nodes given full logic but denied raw block-processing experience show higher consensus failure rates.
Stage-2-only networks show characteristic 'egocentric forking' at predictable rates.
Time-to-finality improves in discrete jumps (stage transitions), not continuously.

name: Choreographic Consensus Protocol
core_claim: Distributed systems can achieve consensus through intensity-weighted signaling where nodes broadcast proposals with vigor proportional to measured quality, and quorum emerges from recruitment cascades rather than explicit voting rounds.

name: Shadow Bias Projection Theory
core_claim: Algorithmic biases cast directional shadows whose length and direction depend on the angle of inquiry, like a sundial gnomon. Bias detection requires measuring shadow patterns across multiple inquiry angles rather than seeking a single bias metric.

name: Affective Magnetosphere Theory
core_claim: Collective emotions behave as charged particles within a social magnetosphere: external events act as solar wind injecting emotional energy into a society's relational field structure, where that energy is channeled along pre-existing network lines and excites distinct social strata to produce characteristic emotional colors.

name: Galois Theory of Political Coalition Structure
core_claim: The solvability of political coalitions corresponds to the structure of their Galois groups: simple coalitions (cyclic group structure) can be decomposed into stable bilateral agreements, while complex coalitions with non-abelian group structure resist decomposition and collapse unpredictably. The fundamental theorem of Galois theory maps onto coalition politics: each subgroup corresponds to a sub-coalition, and the lattice of subgroups predicts which defections are possible and which combinations are stable.

name: Hydraulic Jump Theory of Emotional Regulation
core_claim: Emotional dysregulation events are hydraulic jumps: emotional intensity flows as a fast, shallow (supercritical) stream during acute stress, then abruptly transitions to a slow, deep (subcritical) state when a regulatory mechanism (therapeutic intervention, social support) introduces sufficient flow resistance. The energy dissipated at the jump manifests as physiological arousal (tears, trembling). Chronic dysregulation occurs when the emotional Froude number stays permanently supercritical — the person never encounters sufficient resistance to trigger the jump.

name: Rootstock-Scion Compatibility Theory of Organ Transplant Rejection
core_claim: Organ transplant compatibility can be modeled using viticulture's rootstock-scion framework: the recipient's immune system is the rootstock that must form a graft union with the donor organ (scion). Compatibility depends not on identity but on complementarity at the graft interface — just as Vitis riparia rootstock supports Vitis vinifera scions despite being different species, because their cambial layers align. Immunosuppression protocols are the viticultural equivalent of grafting wax — temporary protection that allows the graft union to establish before the rootstock's defenses are restored.

name: Rennet Coagulation Theory of Political Coalition Formation
core_claim: Political coalitions form through rennet coagulation dynamics: diffuse political actors (casein micelles) remain suspended in the electorate (whey) until a catalytic event (rennet enzyme) destabilizes the repulsive charges keeping them apart. The coagulation produces a fragile initial 'curd' (proto-coalition) whose firmness depends on cut timing — too early and the coalition lacks structural integrity, too late and it becomes rubbery and unresponsive. The expelled whey represents moderate voters who don't fit the coagulated ideological matrix.

name: Sourdough Gluten Matrix Theory of Constitutional Structural Integrity
core_claim: Constitutional integrity depends on gluten matrix development: the document's textual provisions (glutenin and gliadin proteins) must be worked (interpreted, litigated, amended) to develop the elastic network (doctrinal framework) that gives the constitution its structural strength. Under-worked constitutions (rarely litigated) lack gluten development and crumble under stress; over-worked constitutions (excessively amended) develop tough, inextensible gluten that tears rather than stretches. The autolyse technique (letting flour hydrate before kneading) maps onto constitutional ratification periods where the text absorbs public meaning before active judicial development begins.

name: Cheesemaking Affinage Theory of Philosophical System Maturation
core_claim: Philosophical systems mature through affinage — the controlled aging process that transforms fresh cheese (raw intuitions) into complex aged cheese (mature philosophical systems). The rind that develops during affinage (the hardened external presentation of the system — its terminology, formalism, institutional apparatus) both protects the interior from contamination (keeps the system coherent) and introduces the very molds and bacteria (interlocutors, critics) that create the system's distinctive flavor. Philosophical systems that are vacuum-sealed against criticism (analytic rigor without engagement) never develop complexity; those left entirely exposed (continental openness without structure) decompose into mush.

name: Moraine Formation Theory of Legal Precedent Accumulation
core_claim: Legal precedent accumulates at jurisdictional boundaries like glacial moraines: as the 'glacier' of active jurisprudence advances (expanding legal doctrine), it deposits a terminal moraine of settled precedent at its furthest reach. When doctrine retreats (legal reform, constitutional reinterpretation), it leaves behind lateral moraines of partially overturned precedent that create uneven legal terrain. The stratigraphic layers within a precedent moraine record the glacial advances and retreats of judicial philosophy across centuries.

name: Bragg Diffraction Theory of Cultural Pattern Recognition
core_claim: Cross-cultural understanding operates through Bragg diffraction: cultural practices form a periodic lattice, and an observer can only perceive the underlying structure when their interpretive 'wavelength' (conceptual framework) satisfies the Bragg condition for that lattice spacing. Misunderstanding occurs when the observer's framework wavelength produces no constructive interference — the culture appears amorphous. Anthropological training works by providing observers with a tunable wavelength source (multiple theoretical frameworks) that can be adjusted to diffract off different cultural lattice spacings.

name: Quantum Gate Fidelity Theory of Pedagogical Assessment
core_claim: Educational assessments should be evaluated using quantum gate fidelity metrics: each test question is a 'gate operation' intended to transform the student's knowledge state, and the fidelity of the assessment measures how closely the actual transformation matches the intended one. Low-fidelity assessments (poorly written questions, ambiguous prompts) introduce errors that compound across the test — just as low gate fidelity compounds across a quantum circuit — producing a final measured state (test score) that bears decreasing resemblance to the student's actual knowledge state. Assessment design should target the same fidelity thresholds that quantum error correction demands.

name: Ferrofluid Spike Dynamics Theory of Crowd Panic Formation
core_claim: Crowd panic events follow ferrofluid spike dynamics: when a magnetic field (threat stimulus) is applied to a ferrofluid (dense crowd), normal-field instability produces spontaneous spike formations — columns of fluid that erupt perpendicular to the surface. In crowds, perceived threats create analogous 'spikes' of directed motion that erupt from the crowd surface. The critical insight is that spike spacing and height are determined by the balance between surface tension (social cohesion) and magnetic force (threat intensity), not by individual particle decisions. Crowd management should focus on modifying the 'surface tension' of the crowd (physical barriers, information channels) rather than the magnetic field (threat itself), because spike geometry is controllable even when the field is not.

name: Miura-Ori Auxetic Folding Theory of Organizational Restructuring
core_claim: Organizational restructuring should follow Miura-ori folding principles: the Miura fold's auxetic property (pulling in one direction causes expansion in the perpendicular direction, unlike normal materials that contract) maps onto the counterintuitive finding that organizational compression in one dimension (reducing hierarchy levels) should produce expansion in the perpendicular dimension (wider span of control, more lateral connections). Organizations restructured along Miura-ori principles would be single-degree-of-freedom systems — a single coordinated action (strategic directive) would simultaneously reconfigure all elements, unlike conventional restructurings that require independent adjustment of each department. The entire organization folds and unfolds as a unit, enabling rapid strategic pivots.

name: Curd Moisture Partitioning Theory of Attention Distribution in Meditation
core_claim: Meditation practice involves curd moisture partitioning: the meditator's task is to expel excess 'whey' (discursive thinking, sensory distraction) from the 'curd' (focused awareness) through sustained gentle pressure (continued attention to the meditation object). Pressing too hard (forceful concentration) produces dry, crumbly curd (rigid, brittle attention that shatters upon any disturbance); pressing too gently (passive observation without effort) retains too much whey (awareness remains diffuse and unfocused). The cheesemaker's knowledge that different cheeses require different moisture levels maps onto the contemplative traditions' insight that different meditation practices aim for different attention textures — vipassana seeks a relatively moist curd (awareness permeable to sensation), while samatha seeks a drier, firmer curd (highly consolidated attention).

name: Olfactory Fatigue Theory of Voter Apathy
core_claim: Voter apathy follows the same adaptation curve as olfactory fatigue in perfumery: repeated exposure to political messaging causes receptor-level desensitization, rendering citizens unable to detect differences between candidates just as a nose becomes blind to ambient fragrance. Campaign strategists unconsciously exploit this by introducing 'contrasting notes' (attack ads, scandal) that temporarily reset the electorate's olfactory receptors. Voter turnout correlates inversely with the duration of campaign exposure, following a logarithmic decay matching olfactory adaptation kinetics.

name: Pyrotechnic Color Chemistry Theory of Emotional Expression in Art
core_claim: The emotional palette available to an artist is constrained by the same principles as pyrotechnic color chemistry: each emotional 'color' requires a specific combination of experiential 'metal salts' (lived experience = strontium for red, barium for green) and technical 'oxidizers' (craft mastery that allows combustion of raw experience into visible light). Artists who lack either the right experiential compounds or sufficient technical oxidizer produce dim, muddy emotional colors. The tradeoff between color purity and brightness in pyrotechnics mirrors the art-world tension between emotional specificity and broad accessibility.

name: Origami Flat-Foldability Theory of Constitutional Design
core_claim: A constitution is a legal origami: it must be 'flat-foldable' — meaning its provisions, when tested by real cases, must be able to collapse into consistent binary decisions (constitutional/unconstitutional) without self-intersection. The Kawasaki-Justin theorem (angles around any vertex must satisfy alternating-sum conditions for flat foldability) translates directly: at any legal 'vertex' where multiple constitutional provisions converge, the doctrinal angles must satisfy consistency conditions or the constitution produces irreconcilable self-intersections. Constitutional crises are failed flat-folds — attempts to collapse a crease pattern that violates the theorem's conditions.

name: Triboelectric Charge Transfer Theory of Cultural Appropriation
core_claim: Cultural contact produces triboelectric charge transfer: when two cultures 'rub' against each other (sustained contact), electrons (cultural elements — music, cuisine, vocabulary, fashion) transfer from one surface to another based on each culture's position in the triboelectric series (power hierarchy). The direction of transfer is predictable: elements flow from the culture with higher triboelectric affinity (lower power, more 'giving') to the one with lower affinity (higher power, more 'receiving'). The transferred charge (appropriated elements) creates a static potential difference (resentment, inequality) that eventually discharges as a spark (cultural backlash). Grounding (equitable exchange, attribution, reciprocity) prevents dangerous charge accumulation.

name: Laban Effort-Shape Theory of Glacial Flow Morphology
core_claim: Glacial flow patterns can be classified using Laban's effort-shape framework: glaciers exhibit characteristic combinations of weight (ice thickness pressure), time (flow velocity), space (valley confinement), and flow (laminar vs. surging). Temperate glaciers display 'sustained, direct, heavy' effort qualities producing predictable U-shaped valleys, while surge-type glaciers alternate between 'bound' quiescent phases and 'free' surge phases — a movement quality shift that maps onto Laban's effort transitions and predicts the geomorphological record each glacier type leaves behind.

name: Fragrance Accord Theory of Coalition Politics
core_claim: Political coalitions stabilize or collapse according to the same logic as perfumery accords: each party contributes a distinct ideological 'note,' and the coalition persists only when the blend produces a unified identity that none of the individual notes could achieve alone. When one party's note becomes too dominant — like an unbalanced top note — the accord collapses and voters detect the constituent ideologies as separate, clashing scents rather than a coherent platform.

name: Euler Graph Theory of Liturgical Ritual Design
core_claim: Well-designed liturgical rituals are Eulerian circuits: they traverse every sacred element (edge) exactly once and return to the starting state, ensuring that no element of worship is omitted or redundantly repeated. Rituals that fail the Eulerian condition — containing vertices of odd degree (elements that don't connect smoothly to others) — require awkward transitions or forced repetitions that congregants experience as liturgical 'seams.' The historical evolution of liturgical rites can be understood as an optimization process converging toward Eulerian structure.

name: Laban Effort-Shape Theory of Machine Learning Model Interpretability
core_claim: Neural network behavior can be characterized using Laban Movement Analysis effort qualities: a model's decision-making has Weight (how forcefully it commits to a classification — confidence magnitude), Time (how urgently it converges — training speed), Space (how directly or indirectly it navigates feature space — attention pattern geometry), and Flow (how bound or free its representations are — regularization tightness). Models that are 'all Weight, no Flow' (high confidence, rigid representations) produce the brittle overconfidence that characterizes adversarial vulnerability. Interpretability tools should report Laban effort profiles alongside accuracy metrics, giving practitioners an embodied vocabulary for model behavior that accuracy numbers alone cannot provide.

name: Dansgaard-Oeschger Theory of Fashion Cycles
core_claim: Fashion trend cycles exhibit Dansgaard-Oeschger oscillation dynamics: long periods of gradual stylistic cooling (minimalism trends, normcore) are punctuated by abrupt warming events (maximalism surges, bold pattern revivals) that occur on a quasi-periodic ~20-year cycle. The rapid onset and slow decay of each fashion warming event mirrors the sawtooth waveform of D-O climate oscillations, driven by an analogous thermohaline-like cultural circulation where deep currents of subcultural innovation periodically breach into mainstream surface fashion.

name: Bonsai Miniaturization Theory of Cryptographic Key Compression
core_claim: Cryptographic key management should follow bonsai miniaturization principles: just as bonsai cultivation constrains a full tree's genetic potential into a miniature form that retains all essential branching structure through selective pruning and root restriction, key derivation functions should compress maximum entropy into minimal key lengths by selectively pruning redundant entropy branches while preserving the full cryptographic 'canopy.' Keys that are miniaturized rather than simply truncated retain structural resilience the way a bonsai retains storm-resistance despite its size.

name: Milankovitch Forcing Theory of Sur Lie Autolysis Rhythms
core_claim: Yeast autolysis during sur lie aging follows Milankovitch orbital forcing patterns at the cellar timescale: seasonal temperature oscillations (annual cycle), barometric pressure variations (synoptic cycle), and long-period cellar humidity fluctuations (multi-year cycle) each drive autolysis at different frequencies. The total autolysis rate is the superposition of these three forcing cycles, and the most complex, desirable flavor profiles emerge when the cycles constructively interfere — producing windows of intense autolytic activity separated by quiescent intervals that allow intermediate compounds to equilibrate before the next burst.

name: Signature Gathering Theory of Neural Ensemble Formation
core_claim: Neural ensembles assemble like bookbinding signatures: individual neurons are 'folded' into functional groups (signatures) by correlated activity, then these signatures are 'gathered' into coherent assemblies by oscillatory binding. The spine of the neural codex is the dominant oscillation frequency, and the binding strength follows the same adhesive-failure curve as bookbinding — too rigid and the ensemble cannot recruit new members, too flexible and it disintegrates under noise.

name: Rossby Wave Theory of Tonal Register Drift
core_claim: Tonal register drift in tone languages propagates through speaker communities as Rossby waves propagate through the atmosphere: perturbations in the 'mean flow' of tonal register (the average pitch range of a speech community) generate oscillatory waves that propagate westward (or outward from urban centers) due to the Coriolis-like effect of social prestige gradients. These waves modulate local tonal inventories as they pass, producing the observed geographic patterns of tonal merger and split that correlate with dialect isoglosses. The wave speed and wavelength predict the timescale of tonal change.

name: Crease Pattern Assignment Theory of Urban Zoning
core_claim: Urban zoning maps are crease pattern assignments in which each zone boundary is a fold line that must be consistently assigned mountain or valley status — residential/commercial or industrial/green — such that the city can 'fold flat' into a functional configuration. Zoning conflicts arise exactly when the pattern is not globally flat-foldable: adjacent zones create impossible overlaps that manifest as noise complaints, traffic congestion, and regulatory disputes.

name: Puppetry String Coupling Theory of Quantum Entanglement Communication
core_claim: Marionette string coupling provides an intuitive but structurally precise model for quantum entanglement: each string connects a control bar degree-of-freedom to a puppet limb, and the puppeteer's challenge — coordinating multiple coupled strings where pulling one inevitably perturbs others — mirrors the challenge of quantum gate operations on entangled qubits. The marionette's 'crosstalk problem' (intended knee movement producing unintended head tilt) is formally analogous to entanglement-induced error propagation, and puppetry's centuries-old solutions (string routing, counterweights, bridge configurations) suggest novel error-mitigation architectures for multi-qubit systems.

name: Pyrotechnic Color Chemistry Theory of Emotional Regulation
core_claim: Emotional experiences are pyrotechnic color chemistry: different metal salts (neurotransmitter systems) produce different spectral colors (emotional qualia) when burned (activated). Strontium produces red (anger/excitement via norepinephrine), barium produces green (calm/safety via serotonin), copper produces blue (sadness/reflection via acetylcholine). Emotional dysregulation is a contaminated star composition — impure compounds that produce muddy, unpredictable colors instead of clean spectral lines. Therapeutic intervention is the purification of the star composition: isolating the contributing compounds and adjusting their ratios to produce the intended emotional 'display' rather than an uncontrolled conflagration.

name: Tectonic Predator-Prey Dynamics
core_claim: Oceanic and continental plates form coupled oscillatory systems analogous to predator-prey dynamics, where subducting oceanic plates (prey) are consumed at convergent boundaries by overriding continental plates (predators), producing cyclical pulses in plate area, velocity, and supercontinent assembly that follow Lotka-Volterra-type equations.

mapped_components.unit: Lithospheric plate typed as oceanic (prey) or continental (predator); population size maps to total plate area of each type
mapped_components.variation: Mantle convection and ridge-push forces generate new oceanic crust (prey birth rate), while continental rifting spawns new fragments (predator reproduction enabled by prey consumption)
mapped_components.selection: Subduction acts as predation: dense oceanic lithosphere is consumed beneath buoyant continental lithosphere, rate proportional to convergent boundary length × velocity
mapped_components.fitness: Plate persistence over geological time, measured as cumulative area-weighted lifespan
mapped_components.boundary: Earth's fixed surface area acts as conserved carrying capacity — total oceanic + continental area is constant

falsifiable_predictions: Total oceanic and continental crust area should show anti-correlated oscillations with a period of 400-700 Myr, with oceanic peaks leading continental aggregation by a quarter-cycle lag (~100-175 Myr), recoverable from zircon age distributions.

Global mean subduction rate should correlate with the product of total oceanic plate area × total convergent margin length, fitting a bilinear interaction term (R² > 0.6) better than either variable alone.

name: Galois-Curry: Automorphism Groups of Proof Spaces
core_claim: The solvability of a type inhabitation problem is determined by the symmetry group of proof-preserving transformations on its derivation tree. A type is 'radically inhabitable' if and only if its proof automorphism group is solvable — mirroring how the Galois group determines solvability by radicals.

mapped_components.unit: Type extension — embedding one type system into a richer one
mapped_components.variation: Proof automorphisms permuting valid derivations while preserving typing judgments
mapped_components.selection: Group structure determines whether inhabitation decomposes into tactic steps via normal subgroup chain
mapped_components.fitness: Radical inhabitability — inhabitation via finite chain of canonical tactics
mapped_components.boundary: Expressiveness of the type system (System F vs dependent types with universes)

falsifiable_predictions: Types in dependent type theory exist whose proof automorphism groups are non-solvable, requiring non-compositional proof steps.
All System F inhabitation problems are decidable by compositional tactic search (solvable automorphism groups).
Higher inductive types introduce non-abelian simple quotients, predicting tactic-based prover incompleteness.

name: Cognitive Condensation Theory
core_claim: Cooper pair formation is a phase transition analogous to flow state entry: scattered electrons condense into coherent paired states exhibiting zero-resistance transport when challenge-skill balance (phonon coupling at critical temperature) is reached.

name: Entangled Intentionality Theory
core_claim: Entangled particles function as if each maintains a 'mental model' of its partner's measurement context — Bell violations correspond to second-order intentionality exceeding the first-order (local hidden variable) ceiling, bounded by a no-communication constraint analogous to cognitive load limits on recursive mentalizing.

mapped_components.unit: Entangled pair as mutual-modeling dyad
mapped_components.variation: Measurement basis choice as perspective-taking frame
mapped_components.selection: Supraclassical correlations require at least second-order intentionality (modeling what the other models)
mapped_components.fitness: Bell violation degree as 'social competence'; Tsirelson bound = perfect mutual modeling
mapped_components.boundary: No-communication theorem as cognitive load ceiling — correlations can't become a channel

falsifiable_predictions: N-party entanglement decoherence scales like N-agent recursive belief difficulty.
Partial decoherence defaults to first-order correlations (Bell-satisfying), not uniform degradation.
Weak measurements show contextual updating consistent with Bayesian belief revision.

name: Chromatic Mythography
core_claim: Narrative archetypes function as graph colorings over a conflict-adjacency structure: each archetype is a color assigned so no two conflicting characters share the same role. The chromatic number determines the minimum archetypes needed for structural coherence.

name: Crease-Code Folding Theory
core_claim: Linear sequences fold into functional 3D structures by satisfying local angular constraints analogous to origami theorems. Misfolding pathologies arise when local constraint satisfaction is achieved but global flat-foldability is violated, producing metastable trapped states.

name: Flat-Foldability Conditions for Epidemic Containment
core_claim: Epidemic containment zones can be optimized using origami flat-foldability constraints: each quarantine boundary acts as a crease line, and the Kawasaki-Justin theorem's requirement that crease angles sum to 180° maps onto the constraint that containment cordons must partition a population into regions whose contact surfaces sum to a manageable total. Containment fails — the 'paper' cannot fold flat — when too many boundaries converge at a single node, exactly as real outbreaks escape at transportation hubs.
